daddy-eddies-roast-pork-pernil-puerto-ri.name: Daddy Eddie's Roast Pork (pernil), Puerto Rican-style
instructions: Combine garlic cloves, olive oil, vinegar, oregano, salt, and black pepper in a mortar and pestle; mash into a paste.
Cut deep slits into pork with a small knife. Stuff slits with garlic paste; rub any remaining paste over pork.
Place pork in a plastic roasting bag and put in a roasting pan with a rack. Let marinate in the refrigerator, 8 to 48 hours.
Take pork out of the refrigerator, uncover, and bring to room temperature, 1 to 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Roast pork skin-side down in the preheated oven until golden-brown, about 2 hours.
Flip pork and continue roasting, skin-side up, until juices run clear and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads at least 63°C (63 degrees C), 2 to 4 hours more.

date-balls.name: Date Balls
instructions: Stir butter, dates, sugar, and egg yolks together in a saucepan over medium heat; bring to a boil. Cook for 2 minutes, then remove from the heat.
Stir in rice cereal, pecans, and vanilla. Let rest until cool enough to handle, 5 to 10 minutes. Roll cooled mixture into 24 small balls. Roll each ball in confectioners' sugar.

delicious-curry-chicken-wrap-comedera.name: Delicious Curry Chicken Wrap
delicious-curry-chicken-wrap-comedera.original_name: Rico wrap de pollo al curry
instructions: Corta la pechuga de pollo en cubos medianos o tiras.
Agrega la pechuga de pollo cortada en un bol, sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Incorpora el comino, el curry y el ajo en polvo. Mezcla muy bien.
Pour the natural yogurt without sugar and mixture until everything's integrated. Let marinar for 30 minutes so that chicken impregnates from flavors.
After that time, heat up a frying pan with some olive oil and splits the chicken for about 12 minutes or till it's cooked in its own tidal.
Debe quedar sellado, pero un poco jugoso. Apaga y deja reposar.
Corta la cebolla en finas julianas o aros. Lava muy bien las hojas de lechuga y trocea el cilantro.
To put the wrap together, put a lettuce leaf into the flour omelette and then a portion of the chicken and with onion and cilantro to taste.
Roast with some salsa of your choice or just add an olive oil chorrit,
Roll the wrap and get ready. Enjoy!

delicious-gnocchi-skewers-with-chorizo-c.name: Delicious Gnocchi Skewers With Chorizo
delicious-gnocchi-skewers-with-chorizo-c.original_name: Deliciosas brochetas de ñoquis con chorizo

ingredients.item: 150 g fresh chorizo (can be Spanish or Spanish)
1 cda de aceite de oliva extra virgen
Palitos de brocheta de madera remojados en agua 30 minutos

instructions: Cooking the necks with boiling water with salt till they float about 3 minutes. Drain and reserve.
To cut the chorizo into 1 cm slices and sauté slightly into a frying pan without oil to release some of its fat and smell.
To cut the pepper and pumpkin into pieces similar to chorizo.
Retiring at every clasp alternates with ñoqui, chorizo, pepper, pumpkin and cherry tomato.
Mezclar aceite de oliva, ajo, romero y tomillo. Pintar las brochetas con esta mezcla.
Grilling or non-stick frying pan at medium to high heat for 5-7 minutes, turning to wear uniformly.
Serve hot with a light yogurt sauce with lemon or basil pesto for a fresh touch.

detoxifying-golden-milk-a-drink-full-of-.name: Detoxifying Golden Milk: A Drink Full Of Well-being
detoxifying-golden-milk-a-drink-full-of-.original_name: Leche dorada desintoxicante: una bebida llena de bienestar
instructions: In a small pot with medium heat, add milk with the vanilla, honey, turmeric, cinnamon, ginger, pepper and cardamom.
Mezcla con una varilla manual para integrar bien los ingredientes.
Cooking for 5 minutes or until the mixture is hot, without boiling.
Sirve caliente y disfruta.

diy-poached-shrimp.name: Diy Poached Shrimp
instructions: Using kitchen shears, cut along the length of the backs of shrimp through shells and just deep enough into flesh to expose veins; remove veins.

Bring a small stockpot of water to a boil and season generously with salt. Add onion, parsley, celery, bay leaf, wine, and peppercorns. Squeeze juice from lemons into pot, then add lemons. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 10–15 minutes. Return to a rolling boil. Add shrimp, cover pot, and remove from heat. Let stand just until shrimp are cooked through, about 3 minutes.
Transfer shrimp to a bowl of ice water with a slotted spoon and let cool. Drain; peel shrimp, leaving tails intact. Serve with cocktail sauce and lemon wedges.

does-not-disappoint-breakfast-casserole.name: Does Not Disappoint Breakfast Casserole

ingredients.prep: such as baguettes, sourdough, or ciabatta

instructions:
Preheat your oven to 177°C. In a 12-inch ovenproof skillet, brown the sausage over medium heat. You want hunks of moist sausage suspended in the finished dish, so take care not to overcook or over-crumble it this go- round. Scoop the sausage out of the skillet and transfer to a bowl large enough to hold all the ingredients. Go about wilting the spinach with ½ teaspoon of the salt
in the same skillet. Squeeze as much liquid out of the spinach as you can without much trouble and transfer to the bowl with the sausage. Add the bread, cheese, and roasted red peppers.

In a smaller bowl, whisk the eggs, milk, cream, and remaining 1 teaspoon salt till homogenous. Stir the Red Weapons into the egg mixture, then pour that into the big bowl with the sausage and other stuff. Stir it up and dump everything back into the skillet.

At this point you could refrigerate the breakfast casserole overnight or you can go right to the business of baking it. Either way, whenever you’re ready, slide the skillet onto the middle rack of your oven and bake for 1 hour, until the top is crisp and browned in spots.

dogfish-ambotic-teleculinaria.name: Dogfish Ambotic

ingredients.item: 1/2 teaspoon of black pepper in grain

instructions: Season the fish with salt and reserve. Praise the onion and garlic, peeled and chopped, in a pot with the olive oil, in mild heat, then add the tomato pulp and water and stir.

Add the cardamoms, ginger, saffron, pepper and cilantro, all previously crushed, as well as the chopped malagueta. When boiling, add the fish and let it cook for about 15 minutes. In the end, add the vinegar and let it boil for another 2 minutes.

Prepare the rice: light another pot with the butter and crushed garlic and let it shine. Add the rice, saute very well and then add the water, previously heated. Season with salt, cover and let boil for 5 minutes. Stir and cook for another 5 minutes in a light. Then stir again and let cook another 5 minutes. Turn off the fire and let it lie down for 10 minutes. Serve as a follow-up of the ambotic cação.

dreyers-peppermint-sundaes.name: Dreyer's Peppermint Sundaes

ingredients.item: Dreyer's slow churned® peppermint ice cream
Crushed candy canes or peppermint candies

instructions: In a sundae glass, layer from the bottom up: chocolate or fudge sauce, Dreyer's Slow Churned® Peppermint Ice Cream, crushed candy canes or peppermint candies, and crumbled brownies.

dried-tomatoes-and-olives-bread-recipe-l.name: Dried Tomatoes And Olives Bread Recipe
instructions: 1. Take a deep rough of flour, yeast, sugar and salt, stir.
2. Add water and olive oil, knead a dough that does not resist.
3. Finally add dry tomatoes and olives, knead them evenly.
4. Cover 1 hour.
5. Take the oily paper-series oven tray, shape.
6. 200°C bake for 35 minutes.

dry-stuffing-with-olive-oil-lezzet.name: Dry Stuffing With Olive Oil

ingredients.item: 1 kg of dry pepper and eggplant

instructions: 1. Peel the shells of onions and chop the cube in shape.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large pan and roast onion.
3. Wash the Pirinci and strain.
4. Pepper Shaker and Saucer, ricenç, pepper, flake red pepper and mint, and roast 1-2 minutes.
5. Add 1 cup of hot water and brew off the cover.
6. Keep dry peppers and eggplants half an hour in hot water.
7. Sudan in the strainer.
8. Drink where you prepare water filter pepper and eggs; filled with material and index the pot.
9. 1 this half water glass add water and cook the cover for 20 minutes in medium fire.
10. Take the pot from the stove.
11. 11. S&uuml with fresh mint leaves.
12. Serve cold or cold.
12. August If you wish, you can also skip the eye in the recipe of sourdough with a different version.

duck-breast-zucchini-tournedos.name: Duck Breast & Zucchini Tournedos

ingredients.item: Dried cep mushrooms ('champagne cork' or bouchon) or porcini

instructions: For the mushroom powder, process the dried cep mushrooms until finely ground, combine them with the pepper and herbes de Provençe.
Cut the duck breasts lengthways into 3 mm (⅛ inch) wide strips.

Lay out the strips of duck two by two on top of each other, alternating layers of fat and lean. Cut the zucchini into strips using a vegetable peeler. Lay the strips of zucchini on top of the duck, season with the mushroom powder and season with salt. Roll up the strips tightly to make tournedos and tie with string. Make 6 tournedos in this way. Cook over gentle heat 5 minutes each side.

duck-confit-crostini-with-pickled-cherri.name: Duck Confit Crostini With Pickled Cherries And Duck Cracklings

ingredients.prep: crushed, or  0.25 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Bring vinegar, sugar, mustard seeds, rosemary sprig, chile, ½ tsp. salt, and ½ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until sugar and salt are dissolved, about 3 minutes. Mix in cherries, remove from heat, and let sit at least 1 hour to pickle mustard seeds.
Preheat oven to 425°. Arrange bread on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with oil and season with salt and pepper. Bake until golden, 6–8 minutes.
Remove skin from duck; set aside. Pull meat from bones and finely chop; discard bones. Transfer duck to a medium bowl; set aside.

Cook reserved duck skin in a medium skillet over medium heat, pressing down with a spatula to help it make contact with the pan, and turning occasionally, until deep golden brown and crisp, about 6 minutes (resist the urge to turn up the heat; you’ll have better results if the fat slowly renders from the skin before crisping). Transfer skin to paper towels to drain; season with salt. Let cool, then crumble into small pieces. Pour rendered fat in skillet over reserved duck meat and toss to combine.

Strain ¼ cup cherries from pickling liquid and coarsely chop. Add cherries and 2 tsp. pickling liquid to duck mixture and toss to combine; taste and season with salt and pepper. Spoon duck mixture onto toasts, top with scallions, duck cracklings, and drizzle with pickling liquid.
Do ahead: Cherries can be pickled 2 weeks ahead; cover and chill. Duck mixture can be made and skin crisped 2 days ahead. Cover and chill duck mixture; store skin airtight at room temperature.
